scenarios.description: search with term not in index should return empty list (branch index.containsKey false)
pseudocode: THEN assert returned list size is 0

scenarios.description: search with term present in index but no documents mapped (branch index.containsKey true, termDocs.size 0)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex index contains key "emptyTerm" mapped to empty map
pseudocode: THEN assert returned list size is 0

scenarios.description: search skips documents whose Movie is missing (branch movie == null)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex index contains termâ†’{1â†’1} but movies map is empty
pseudocode: GIVEN index termâ†’{1â†’1} and no movies added
THEN assert returned list size is 0

scenarios.description: search returns single result for one matching movie (branch movie != null, loop-1)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with one movie docId=1 containing term once
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list has one SearchResult with docId=1 and relevanceScore equals computeIDF(1)
pseudocode: THEN assert list size==1 and list.get(0).getDocId()==1 and list.get(0).getRelevanceScore()==Math.log((1-1+0.5)/(1+0.5))

scenarios.description: search returns sorted results for two movies by descending score (loop-2)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with two movies both containing term once
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size==2 and sorted by descending relevanceScore
pseudocode: GIVEN index built with movie(1,"A","",2010,"term") and movie(2,"B","",2011,"term")
THEN assert list.get(0).getRelevanceScore()>=list.get(1).getRelevanceScore() and both docIds present

scenarios.description: search scoring accounts for term frequency >1 (loop-1, TF>1)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with movie(1) content having term twice
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size==1 and relevanceScore > computeIDF(1)
pseudocode: GIVEN index built with movie(1,"","",2012,"term term other")

scenarios.description: search is case-insensitive: uppercase query matches lowercase index (branch index.containsKey true)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with term "term" added in lowercase
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list is non-empty as for lowercase query
pseudocode: THEN assert returned list size==1 and docId==1

scenarios.description: search with null term should throw NullPointerException at toLowerCase
search with empty string term normalizes to "" and returns empty list (boundary empty-term)
pseudocode: THEN assert returned list size is 0

scenarios.description: search with three matching movies exercises loop with N>2 iterations (loop-3)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with three movies each containing term once
scenarios.expectedResult: returned list size==3 and sorted by descending relevanceScore
pseudocode: GIVEN index with movie(1..3) each content "term"
